specific_location: below the dam of Rose Pond, Chico Basin Ranch, 2/3rds of the way east near the eastern most of the three ephemeral ponds
description: previously identified by David Tonnessen based first on sharp chip notes and later by viewing. When I arrived we used tape of SEWR call notes to get it calling. Called about 6 inches to 1.5 feet above ground. When visible, only part of bird seen each time it emerged from dense vegetation. A small wren with a buffy breast. Bill noticeably short/shorter than MARW and sort of thick based. Wings dark brown with much lighter barring. Could see short light-colored eyebrow. At times thin, light and dark streaking on dark back visible. Call notes identical to those on "tape" of SEWR calls.
photographer: Photographer: bill maynard, bill maynard, bill maynard
